title: Duplicate + Move to new space/board/folder in one action
excerpt: We often reuse items and content, but not quite at the template level so we end up selecting and duplicating the information. It would be nice to have the option of duplicating items, groups, docs, etc. and move them imm…

posts.author: TinaSeifert (Tina Seifert)
posts.cookedHtml:
We often reuse items and content, but not quite at the template level so we end up selecting and duplicating the information. It would be nice to have the option of duplicating items, groups, docs, etc. and move them immediately to the new board, group, folder or workspace in one action instead of duplicating the details, waiting for that creation and then copying and moving those items.

Bonus if duplicated information moved to the new group, board or workspace without the tag “copy” within the identifier.
